title: 161  Krishna consciousness means free from all material emotions
speaker: HH Stoka Krishna Maharaj

segments.text: Just like when Narasimhadev appeared and killed all the demonic associates of Hiranyakashipu and also killed Hiranyakashipu.
All the demigods were relieved because they had prayed to the Lord.
But at the same time they were very afraid looking at Narasimhadev.
But Prahlad Maharaj was not at all afraid.
He was completely in bliss.
So devotees, pure devotees are always blissful in Krishna consciousness.
They are always blissful in Krishna consciousness.
So Krishna consciousness is a state of consciousness where one is situated perfectly
in complete absorption
in Krishna.
And in that state there is no question of fear
or there is no question of bewilderment.
There is no question of any other material
material sentiment or emotion.
They are free from all material feelings.
It's completely spiritual.
And it's very evident
in the way the Supreme Lord conducts himself or his devotees.
They are able to relate with the Lord.
It is simply all blissful.
Anandamayobhyasat.
Full of bliss.
